hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json

try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except:
    sys.exit(0)

command = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' not in command:
    sys.exit(0)

print('')
print('PRE-COMMIT CHECKLIST (advisory -- not blocking)')
print('-----------------------------------------------')
print('  [ ] Version headers match log entries?     <- Hook 6 validates this automatically')
print('  [ ] Quick Stats match actual row counts?   <- Hook 7 validates this automatically')
print('  [ ] Session Summary updated this session?')
print('  [ ] Cross-reference sweep done?')
print('  [ ] Backward sweep done?')
print('  [ ] No agents mid-task?')
print(\"  [ ] Sophia's pending list has no backed-up transfers?\")
print('-----------------------------------------------')
print('  Hook 6 + Hook 7 will block if checks fail. Proceeding.')
print('')

sys.exit(0)
"
